out_of_scope: Application code (no changes to AiEng.Platform.App, Application, Domain, Providers.Abstractions, tests)
Completed milestones (M0, M0.5, M1 must not be invalidated)
Architecture rules (no changes to AGENTS.md rules, ARCHITECTURE.md boundaries, DECISIONS.md ADRs)
Milestone ordering (no reordering of M2 through M8)
M2.1 implementation (the plan is revised but not implemented)
External tools (no tool invocations during this session)

last_action.outcome: Revised M2.1 plan to scope the shell foundation only (two layouts, two placeholder shell components, one presentational helper, MainLayout migration). Removed from scope: INavigationRegistry, RouteMetadata, RouteRegistry, AppSidebar, AppNavItem, AppTopBar, AppBreadcrumb, page-route metadata, Pages_AreReachable_Through_Registry architecture test, final page redesigns, reconnect behaviour changes, self-awareness dashboard. Status: Awaiting Approval.

intended_next_action: Read the revised M2.1 plan (.ai/plans/M2.1-application-shell-skeleton.md) and approve it. Then start M2.1 implementation per the 15-step order in section 16 of the plan.
session_notes: The M2 delivery-reconciliation session closes M0.5 (commit 1d98acd) and reconciles the M2 task breakdown into six non-overlapping slices. The session revises the M2.1 plan to remove overlapping scope; creates M2.2 / M2.3 / M2.4 plan stubs; documents the Progressive Coding Rule (.ai/workflows/progressive-coding.md); updates the delivery system (ROADMAP, master-delivery-plan, task-board, current.md, milestones.json, features.json, capabilities.json, tasks.json, session.json, handoffs/latest.md). The session does not modify application code, completed milestones, architecture rules, or milestone ordering. The session does not implement M2.1. The next session approves the revised M2.1 plan and starts M2.1 implementation per Rule 17 in AGENTS.md.
